mapper.select: SELECT * FROM relation WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND task_document_id=#{taskDocumentId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM relation WHERE task_id=#{taskId} AND task_document_id=#{taskDocumentId} AND user_id=#{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relation(task_id, task_document_id, user_id, display_id, type, target_type, target_id, expression, status) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{taskDocumentId}, #{userId}, #{displayId}, #{type}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{expression}, #{status})
